task_completion.description: Verify the survey 'Influenza Vaccine Study Screener 2026' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Influenza Vaccine Study Screener 2026' in the LimeSurvey dashboard, survey list, or survey settings header.

task_completion.description: Verify a question exists to capture the Date of Birth with the code 'DOB'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question in the survey structure or question list with the exact code 'DOB'.

task_completion.description: Verify a question exists to calculate age with the code 'AGE_CALC'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Equation type question in the survey structure or question list with the exact code 'AGE_CALC'.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Medical History' question group exists and contains at least three questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Medical History' in the survey structure panel, and verify there are at least 3 distinct questions listed under this group.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Medical History' group is conditionally visible only to participants aged 18 to 65 (inclusive).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the group settings or relevance equation for the 'Medical History' group. The relevance equation field should contain logic referencing 'AGE_CALC' with conditions for >= 18 and <= 65 (or equivalent logic).

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Active' status badge, a 'Stop this survey' button, or a summary screen indicating the survey is currently active/running.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the conditional logic was entered into the actual LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the relevance equation being typed or saved within the LimeSurvey group settings input fields, rather than in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the survey activation was performed via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking the 'Activate survey' button or navigating the activation confirmation screens in LimeSurvey.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Survey Title: 'Influenza Vaccine Study Screener 2026'. Expected DOB Question Code: 'DOB'. Expected Age Calculation Code: 'AGE_CALC'. The 'Medical History' group must contain >= 3 questions. The relevance equation for the 'Medical History' group must restrict visibility to ages 18 to 65 inclusive (e.g., checking that AGE_CALC is >= 18 and <= 65).
